title: EasyRedstone
description:
A lightweight modpack based on helping redstoners with various new commands.

/saveinventory [name]

/loadinventory [name] [player]

Use macros by going into settings and then controls.

Click "h" to change hotbars
body:
A lightweight modpack based on helping redstoners with various new commands.

**/saveinventory [name]**

_/loadinventory [name] [player]_

Use macros by going into settings and then controls.

_Click "h" to change hotbars_

Ty for downloading

Any issues: Discord: patys7619
